examples: Komatiite in the Sibao Group of northern Guangxi may be divided in ascending order into the cumulus zone, spinifex zone and chilled zone.
Field geological survey and geochemistry indicate that the metamorphic ultrabasic rock in Jifeng area of the north Da Hinggan Ling Mountains is komatiite with spinifex texture.
Uluru, also known as Ayers Rock, is a great symbol in Aboriginal traditions, as are many sacred sites among the Centre's mountain ranges, gorges, dry riverbeds, and spinifex plains.
